nasb.text: Then Joseph said to the people, “Behold, I have today bought you and your land for Pharaoh; now, here is seed for you, and you may sow the land.

esv.text: Then Joseph said to the people, “Behold, I have this day bought you and your land for Pharaoh. Now here is seed for you, and you shall sow the land.

cnv.text: 約瑟對人民說：“看哪，我今日為法老買了你們和你們的田地。這裡有穀種給你們，你們可以種地。

ccb.text: 约瑟对百姓说：“我为法老买了你们和你们的土地，这里有种子，你们可以拿去耕种。

csbs.text: 约瑟对百姓说：“看哪，我今日为法老买了你们和你们的地。看，这些是给你们的种子，你们可以种地了。
